## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `npx @msishamim/create-next-monorepo ...` with these flags: ...
2. Navigate to '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Generated Command
```bash
npx @msishamim/create-next-monorepo my-app --backend ... --orm ... --state ...
```

## Environment
- **OS:** [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Node.js:** [e.g. 20.x, 22.x]
- **Package Manager:** [e.g. pnpm 10.x]
- **Package version:** [e.g. 2.2.1]

## Additional Context
Add any other context, error logs, or screenshots.
